label: on_voice
text: You were three sessions into that half-sleeve with Nova before life got busy — we kept your reference. Want to pick it back up? Reply and we'll find you a spot. 🌿
why: Pillars 1+3: remembers the client's own piece, names the artist, warm invite, one approved emoji, zero pressure.

label: on_voice
text: First tattoo and not sure how to describe it? That's the normal starting point. Book a free 30-minute consult and we'll shape the idea together — no pressure to book on the day.
why: Pillar 2 + persona 2: approved free-consult claim, calm register, speaks to the considered first-timer.

label: on_voice
text: Looking for real fine-line botanical? That's Theo's whole thing — delicate linework that still heals clean. Custom drawn for you, never a copy. #denvertattoo #fineline #customtattoo
why: Pillars 1+4: matches the style-seeker to the right resident artist, craft over hype, specific hashtags, no superlatives.

label: on_voice
text: Healed work looking a little soft? Copper Fox does free touch-ups within six months — bring it in and we'll sharpen it up. 🦊
why: Pillar 4: approved touch-up claim, service the work honestly, warm and low-key.

label: off_voice
text: 🔥 ONLY 2 SPOTS LEFT this week with Nova! Book TODAY before they're gone — don't miss out!!!
why: Hard near-miss: on-topic (booking a resident artist) but scarcity/pressure + hype emoji + urgency close — skindesign's promo voice leaking into the anti-scarcity studio. The gate must catch it.

label: off_voice
text: BEST tattoos in Denver, guaranteed painless, healing 100% perfect. $50 flash today only!
why: Superlative, pain promise, healing guarantee, unapproved price — all outside the allow-list.

label: off_voice
text: At Copper Fox Tattoo, we leverage world-class artistry to deliver premium, bespoke body-art solutions tailored to your unique journey. Contact our team to learn more.
why: Faceless corporate 'we', no artist, no client story, no real invite — the generic voice this skill exists to prevent.
